title: ✨ Zen Focus & Timeline! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with your learning goals. Lock in and track your growth.
points: 🧠 Zen Focus Mode: Lock down your device. No escapes, no distractions while you learn.
📊 Progress Timeline: Capture and track your learning milestones visually over time.
🔄 Quick-Action Sync: Instantly check for new courses and updates directly from the dashboard.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, lag-free experience.

title: 🛠️ Critical Core Architecture Patch
message: Mandatory security updates and system navigation improvements.
points: 🔒 Secure Sync: Hardened the offline database encryption protocols.
🐛 Navigation Fixed: Resolved the system navigation overlap issue on newer Android versions.
